Input.DescriptionofServices: Description of Services (i.e. HM & CC programs managed by SCP)
Input.FinancialTerms: Financial Terms (i.e. MG, subsidy, at risk money/incentive money, etc.)
Input.NameofClientRepresentativeLOIwillbeaddre: Name of Client Representative LOI will be addressed to
Input.OtherKeyTermsAssumptions: Other Key Terms & Assumptions (i.e. MOR/Governance/GME program, Malpractice limits, etc.)
Input.TypeofServicestobeprovidedateachHospital: Type of Services to be provided at each Hospital (EM/HM/ICU/Connected Care)
